subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 328195911 is not a GRB
body:
A. von Kienlin (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team: 

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 328195911 (110527.564) at
13:31:49.73 UT on 27 May 2011, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact
not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
